title: Nasa tingomariensis
taxonomy: Nasa tingomariensis is classified within the family Loasaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the pringlea or tangutica family. This family consists of around 130 species, mostly found in the Andean regions of South America. Nasa tingomariensis is part of the genus Nasa, which is a group of flowering plants endemic to the Andes in South America. The classification of Nasa tingomariensis reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a member of the Loasaceae family. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and relationships within the genus Nasa.
